rationale: The citing editorial explicitly relies on descriptive evidence about JMR’s 2013–2019 publications (including that about one-third of articles used multiple methods) to support its agenda, and the cited paper’s main contribution is exactly a 401-article coding of JMR 2013–2019 with findings on method diversity and cross-domain convergence. This alignment suggests the citation is likely a substantive evidence/foundation source rather than a passing mention.
